rulings.Case Title: WOLLBORG/MICHELSON PERSONNEL SERVICE INC VS. EXECUTIVE RISK INDEMNITY INC et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JANUARY 4, 2008 LINE 5. DEFENDANT EXECUTIVE RISK INDEMNITY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF'S INTERROGATORIES ARE NOT FACTUALLY DEVOID. DEFENDANT FAILS TO ADDRESS THE IMPORT OF EXHIBIT G THAT SUPPORTS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM THAT DEFENDANT RELIED ONLY ON INFORMATION THAT SUPPORTED ITS DENIAL. DEFENDANT ALSO FAILS TO PRESENT ANY EVIDENCE THAT FIELDS AND BAUMMER ARE NOT MANAGING AGENTS. WITH RESPECT TO PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS: ONE IS OVERRULED GIVEN THAT THE DOCUMENTS PREVIOUSLY WERE ADMITTED; TWO AND THREE ARE OVERRULED; AND FOUR IS OVERRULED BASED ON CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT SECTION 3.1354.(B). SINCE THE COURT RULED THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF, THE COURT HAS NOT RULED ON DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS. =(302/PJM/PB)
